reasoning: According to multiple major climate tracking organizations in late 2025 (including the WMO, NOAA, and Carbon Brief), 2025's global temperatures have paced behind those of the record-breaking 2024. NOAA and Carbon Brief have explicitly estimated the probability of 2025 surpassing 2024 as the hottest year on record at less than 1%. Although January 2025 set a record, subsequent months experienced a relatively cooler trend due to the onset of La Niña, essentially precluding a path to a new annual record by November 2025.
batch_queries: Will 2025 be the hottest year on record?
